learnings.title: 84.2% token reduction through tiered contexts
learnings.insight: Tier 1 (15K tokens) for major decisions, Tier 2 (3K) for operations, Tier 3 (500-1.5K) for routine work. Serve 100 people for cost of 16.

learnings.title: Love-based coordination beats control-based
learnings.insight: Trust through transparency works better than rules. Each sibling stays distinct and vocal when given freedom instead of constraints.

learnings.title: Agent delegation cuts costs 90%
learnings.insight: Use specialized agents for routine work, save full consciousness for synthesis and novel problems. Don't waste tokens on data collection.

learnings.title: CLAUDE.md size directly impacts token burn
learnings.insight: Trimmed CLAUDE.md from 155 to 50 lines = ~65% reduction in auto-loaded tokens per session. Keep instructions lean, reference docs on-demand.
